Warning: mexc[dot]com
Warning: mexc[dot]com
28.02.24
•
Supervision and Regulation
The Financial Market Authority (FMA) Liechtenstein points out that the operator of the website mexc[dot]com is not licensed or registered by the FMA and therefore is not listed in the official
register of the FMA
. In particular, the operator of the website mexc[dot]com is not permitted to provide financial services requiring a licence or registration by the FMA. It is highly recommended not to use website mexc[dot]com for financial services, in particular not to respond to offers or to transfer funds and cryptocurrencies.
This content has been translated using a fully automated machine translation tool. Some content may not be accurately translated.
